channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th May
item.description:
Bed mattress left on street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockley Way, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th May
item.description:
There is a lot of rubbish on the footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finland Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on roundabout, 13th May
item.description:
What 3 words tall.hugs.full This pothole has been there at least 3 months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A2041, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked normal car in electric charging point, 13th May
item.description:
Dear sir’s as an electric vehicle owner I went to charging point when I see in my Electroverse app 1 point available for charge but there is a normal car parked I returned home without charging. Place south esk road katherine road junction E7 8NP Please do action against of this vehicle thanks

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New barriers, 13th May
item.description:
Can a barrier be erected at the exit of the public footpath alongside the river. As there is a zebra crossing by it, cyclists and pedestrians think they can just come straight out and onto the road without checking for traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers, 13th May
item.description:
Road barriers have just been left behind from works carried out to the pavement outside 94 Newlands Park over 3 months ago.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant amount of dumped household items, 13th May
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Bridge Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Primrose Hill court, 13th May
item.description:
Camden council left 2 barriers on the street when collecting sand bags. Camden come and remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King Henry's Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Medical Dangerous waste, 13th May
item.description:
Dangerous medical waste dumped again . Happens weekly . Very serious weekly fly tipping .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ashbourne Grove (by Melbourne Grove) Road sign almost collapsing, 13th May
item.description:
Road sign is dangerously at a point of collapsing. Could damage vehicles and pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Ashbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Melbourne Grove(near Chesterfield Grove)-Abandoned vehicle-3rd Complaint, 13th May
item.description:
3rd Complaint-Clamp has been removed but the vehicle has not been removed. Taking up vital parking space especially for people with mobility problems. It has been there for weeks. Untaxed from 1st April.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 59 Lordship Lane-Flytipping-4th Complaint, 13th May
item.description:
4th Complaint-The establishment is closed down. If it is the duty of another to remove the pellats then it is the council to enforce them of the appropriate disposal of the refuse as it is on the pavement and could cause someone harm if they are visually impaired for example. They need to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove-Flytipping-By tree opposite car wash, 13th May
item.description:
Clothing dumped next to tree. Needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (Along wall of Joe the Juice)-Flytipping-4th Complaint, 13th May
item.description:
4th Complaint: It is completely unacceptable that this is a site for dumping/non-removal of a toilet tank lid and nothing is being done about its removal which will encourage more flytipping and/or inappropriate disposal. The fact that it is a street full of young children and the health and safety is dismissed is shocking. The Duty of Care is not being demonstrated of not enforcing the law towards the organisation or residence in regards to the responsible manner of rubbish disposal/removal, where it will encourage unhygienic practices.This sends a message that this conduct has no accountability. Health and safety of the residents and wider community should be paramount, not ignored.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Box of Stuff Dumped on Pavement, 13th May
item.description:
A large box of stuff has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 37. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can these 2 cherry trees be inspected?, 13th May
item.description:
Both of these trees have cracked trunks. Can they be inspected? There are another pair at top Widmore end of South View also cracked so it would be useful to know all have been inspected by LBB tree officers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Third report of same issue/ Not fixed contrsry to your statement, 13th May
item.description:
This flytipping in the passage on the left side of Henslow House se15 has been reported repeatedly and on 2 occasions issue was reported as Fixed, when it is clearly not, please refer to the photo for reference number. These photos were taken at 19.29 hrs on the 12May, clearly the same flytipped items still there so how can the case be closed/ fixed twice now when it actually is not fixed at all. This is quite worrying because someone is reporting it as fixed even though it is unresolved. Please send someone to collect it. Regards

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Near the suffolk pitch, 12th May
item.description:
Around the suffolk pitch where the garages are there is an immense amount of furniture amongst other miscellaneous items being dumped. Sometimes it is difficult to even drive through to get to the other side

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pownall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter accumulation behind Camberwell Library, 12th May
item.description:
Hello, I’m asking for the green area behind Camberwell Library to be cleaned urgently, as it’s often filthy and even more litter has recently been left there and it is continuing to accumulate. This is an important community space used by many local families, especially children visiting the library and nearby playground. It’s disappointing to see the small green area constantly covered in rubbish. Please could this be cleaned as soon as possible and maintained more regularly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped window shutters, 12th May
item.description:
Dumped in Sunray Gardens a couple of days ago and now left by the main entrance opposite no 3 Elmwood Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmwood Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
